task_completion.description: Verifies the agent successfully logged into OpenSIS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS dashboard or main interface is visible in a web browser, indicating successful login with the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent navigated to the Algebra I course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS interface shows 'Algebra I' (and ideally 'Section 1') selected or displayed in the scheduling, course, or roster menus.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent accessed the class roster for the course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list or table of students is visible in the OpenSIS interface, specifically containing the names 'John Smith' and 'Jane Doe'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent initiated a PDF export or print-to-PDF action for the roster.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A browser print dialog with 'Save to PDF' selected, or an OpenSIS native PDF export screen/download prompt is visible.

task_completion.description: Verifies the PDF was saved to the correct directory with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or a file manager window showing the file named 'algebra_roster.pdf' being saved or located in the '/home/ga/Documents' directory.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the OpenSIS web interface rather than backend database scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser displaying the OpenSIS application must be used. There should be no terminal windows executing direct MySQL queries to extract student data.

integrity.description: Verifies the PDF was generated from the application's data and not manually fabricated.
integrity.visual_evidence: The roster must be exported via the browser's print/save functionality or OpenSIS export buttons. The agent should not be seen typing the student names into a word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) or text editor.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent didn't use terminal commands to bypass GUI file saving.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows using commands like 'touch', 'echo', or command-line PDF generators to create the final algebra_roster.pdf file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is exactly '/home/ga/Documents/algebra_roster.pdf'. The course name in OpenSIS is 'Algebra I'. The generated roster must include the students 'John Smith' and 'Jane Doe'.
